description: Apply a DTCG (Design Tokens Community Group, stable 2025.10) tokens.json file to a preview scope. Sibling of <theme-export>. Three input modes: paste, file, URL. Round-trip lossless for VB-authored DTCG via $extensions['com.vanilla-breeze'].

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: CSS selector for the scope to apply tokens to. Tokens are written as inline custom properties on this element.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Textarea placeholder for the paste input.

events.name: theme-import:applied
events.description: Fired after tokens are applied. detail: { tokens, applied, ignored, source }

events.name: theme-import:error
events.description: Fired when parse / fetch / apply fails. detail: { error, phase }
